* Deepseek v4 is out. There *is* a 2-bit quant that can run within 90 GB ( https://t.co/X3AFAsiH02 ), and it works, however it's only fast on Apple hardware (I've head ~35 tok/s). On AMD, it's ~7 tok/s. IMO actually taking the effort to properly support more

如果你是 RepoPrompt 付费用户会给你送 Codex 的 Credits。 https://t.co/dwXRjdABwV

AI transformation at the enterprise level is a 60T market: the largest unsolved market in history.

Over the last few months, 100+ companies doing $1B to $100B in revenue have reached out to us. We do zero outbound. The contracts are 8 figures, with 9 to 10 figures in savings and

Sent a Zillow link to a new video agent.

It pulled images from the listing, animated them, and created this promotional video with zero input from me.

Hard to see how this doesn't revolutionize how we advertise physical spaces - homes, offices, restaurants, hotels... https://t.co/iIgb1fMeD1
